phrases.cultural_note: Platform zones are segmented; confirm your train class and departure board.

responses.english: Eurostar platforms are on level 0, toward the upper level. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: lay kay uh-roh-STAR son oh nee-VOH zero, vair luh nee-VOH soo-payr-YUHR. swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Les quais Eurostar sont au niveau 0, vers le niveau supérieur. Suivez les panneaux.

phrases.text_local: Où sont les consignes à bagages ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay kon-SEEN yah bah-GAZH
phrases.cultural_note: Station luggage services can have size and security limits.

responses.english: Luggage storage is in the basement, near the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: lay kon-SEEN son oh soo-sol, pray duh lan-TRAY pran-see-PAL
responses.french: Les consignes sont au sous-sol, près de l'entrée principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this is the train to Brussels
phrases.text_local: C'est bien le train pour Bruxelles ?
phrases.pronunciation: say byan leh trahn poor brew-SELL
phrases.cultural_note: Always confirm train number and final destination, not just city name.

responses.english: Yes, this is the train to Brussels. It's train number 9011.
responses.phonetic: wee, say leh trahn poor brew-SELL. say leh nay-may-roh noof-SAHNZ
responses.french: Oui, c'est le train pour Bruxelles. C'est le numéro 9011.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate a ticket
phrases.cultural_note: Validation rules differ by operator; ask before boarding to avoid fines.

responses.english: You need to validate before boarding. The validators are on the platform.
responses.phonetic: voo duh-VAY kom-pos-TAY ah-VON duh mon-TAY. lay kom-pos-TEHR son sur leh kay
responses.french: Vous devez composter avant de monter. Les composteurs sont sur le quai.

phrases.text_local: La file des taxis officiels est où ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah feel day tak-SEE oh-fee-syel eh oo
phrases.cultural_note: Use official taxi queues; avoid touts inside busy station exits.

responses.english: The taxi queue is at the main exit, on the right.
responses.phonetic: lah feel day tak-SEE eh tah lah sor-TEE pran-see-PAL, sur lah drwaht
responses.french: La file des taxis est à la sortie principale, sur la droite.
